# asim_entity_fields.csv

**Generated by:** [`collect_asim_fields.py`](../collect_asim_fields.md)
**Granularity:** One row per (entity, field)
**Type:** ASIM schema reference

## Overview

Field definitions for the ASIM **entities** (User, Device, Application), parsed from the entity documentation pages on Microsoft Learn. Entity fields are the building blocks of role-prefixed fields in schema docs (e.g., `SrcUsername` is the `Username` entity field with the `Src` role).

## Use Cases

- **Entity field reference** — lookup the canonical fields per entity (User, Device, Application).
- **Role-prefix expansion** — to understand what `SrcUsername`, `DstUsername`, `TargetUsername` mean, look up `Username` here.
- **Allowed-value lookup** — for enumerated entity fields, the allowed values are listed here.

## Columns

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `entity` | Entity name: `User`, `Device`, `Application` |
| `section` | Section within the entity doc |
| `field_name` | Base field name without the role prefix |
| `field_class` | `Mandatory`, `Recommended`, `Optional`, `Conditional`, or `Alias` |
| `physical_type` | KQL type |
| `logical_type` | ASIM logical type |
| `aliased_field` | For `Alias` fields: aliased fields |
| `allowed_values` | For `Enumerated` fields: allowed values |
| `description` | Field description |
| `example` | Usage example |
| `note` | Additional notes |
| `doc_url` | Source documentation URL |

## Related CSVs

- [`asim_fields.csv`](asim_fields.md) — schema fields (entity fields appear there with their role prefix applied).
- [`asim_logical_types.csv`](asim_logical_types.md) — logical types referenced from `logical_type`.
